title: Department Manager Vacancy at Big Bazaar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Big Bazaar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Big Bazaar! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Ghaziabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Big Bazaar:
Big Bazaar is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Big Bazaar!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
